query:
SELECT rp.id AS prospect_id, rp.firstName, rp.lastName, rp.email, rp.pipelineStage, rp.createdAt
FROM recruitment_prospects rp
INNER JOIN agent_crm_profiles acp ON LOWER(acp.email) = LOWER(rp.email)
WHERE rp.pipelineStage = 'new_enquiry'
  AND rp.applicationSubmittedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY rp.createdAt DESC;
